query: SELECT us.*, st.name, st.maxVehicles FROM userSubscriptions us LEFT JOIN subscriptionTiers st ON us.tierId = st.id WHERE us.userId = 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT us.*, st.name, st.maxVehicles FROM userSubscriptions us LEFT JOIN subscriptionTiers st ON us.tierId = st.id WHERE us.userId = 2;
